title: Voters are struggling to keep up with Iran war’s twists and turns
description: Americans have grown frustrated with President Donald Trump over his handling of the war. Here’s what several said about how they’re processing the constant changes.

title: Cuban artist and dissident exiled from country after 5 years in prison arrives in US
description: A famous Cuban dissident artist and musician, Luis Manuel Otero Alcántara, arrived in Miami on Saturday after being released from a five-year prison sentence on the condition that he leave his country.

title: Week in Politics: Trump's speech; midterm elections; Todd Blanche and Jay Clayton
description: Three months from the November midterms, President Trump is drawing attention to issues that are not top priorities for voters.

title: Trump wants to impose tariffs on Canada in retaliation for wildfire smoke
description: The White House did not respond to questions about what legal mechanism he would use to impose the tariffs or how the administration would calculate the rate of the levies.

title: As competitive Senate map emerges, both Democrats and Republicans see a path to win
description: More than halfway through the primary elections, the map of competitive Senate races is becoming clearer, though there are still outstanding races to watch.

title: Trump promised evidence of election fraud. Experts say there was none
description: President Trump's primetime address Thursday warned of "shocking vulnerabilities" in U.S. elections, but many election experts say much of Trump's claims amount to old news.

title: The new $1 Trump coin doesn't just buck norms. Experts say it also breaks laws
description: President Trump's face will appear on a new commemorative coin honoring the nation's 250th birthday. It's one of the many unusual places his likeness has popped up this year.

title: Takeaways from Trump's primetime speech. And, at least 2 dead in major Texas flooding
description: President Trump gave a primetime speech raising claims of voting vulnerabilities but offered no new evidence. And, at least 2 people have died in major flooding in Texas.

title: Republican campaigns see immigration as a winning issue for midterms
description: Republicans are spending more money and running more ads on immigration than Democrats are ahead of the November midterm elections, according to an NPR analysis of advertisement data.

title: World leaders meet in D.C. to discuss left-wing political violence
description: Leaders from roughly 60 countries gathered in Washington, DC, to discuss what top Trump administration officials are calling an urgent threat: far left terrorism.

title: Trump claims the country's voting systems are vulnerable in primetime address
description: In a primetime address Thursday night, President Trump raised familiar claims about election integrity just months ahead of a midterm election, where Republicans are expected to take losses.

title: Rep. Jim Himes reacts to Trump's speech on election security
description: NPR's A Martinez discusses President Trump's speech on election security with Connecticut Rep. Jim Himes, the ranking Democrat on the House Intelligence Committee.
